spec_match.rationale: Subscribes to native PerformanceObserver entry types and uses mock soft-navigation entries only when unsupported.

interactive.rationale: Users can toggle observed entry types, trigger route changes, force paint/layout events, and inspect JSON entries.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Fully aligned with the Observer Playground concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Unsupported entry types are labeled, and observers are connected or disconnected per toggle.

references.rationale: Includes the required ChromeStatus reference link.

design_system.rationale: Visuals follow the showcase design system.

summary: The open hard-rule reference issue is resolved.
